title: Loncomelos sanandajense
intro: Loncomelos sanandajense is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose or apple family, native to Iran and Iraq. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Loncomelos sanandajense contains bioactive constituents like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to treat various health conditions, and its leaves are also used in herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
